Designation: Terminal strips: Number of SH terminals
Description: Number of SH terminals on the terminal strip. Shields will be connected to these terminals.

Designation: Terminal strips: Total number of objects on terminal strip
Description: Quantity of all objects on the terminal strip, including the terminal strip definition, terminals, terminal accessories, and function templates.

Designation: Terminal strips: Number of general terminals
Description: Total number of terminals on the terminal strip that are not N, PE, PEN or SH terminals.

Designation: Terminal strips: Number of N terminals
Description: Quantity of N terminals on the terminal strip.

Designation: Terminal strips: Number of PE terminals
Description: Quantity of PE / PEN terminals on the terminal strip.

Designation: Terminal strips: Number of terminals and accessories for terminal diagram
Description: Quantity of terminals and accessories displayed on the terminal diagram.
Quantity of terminals on the terminal strip (independent of type).
Designation of the first terminal on the terminal strip.
Designation of the last terminal on the terminal strip.

Designation: Terminal strips: Page name of terminal diagram
Description: Name of the first page of the terminal diagram for the reported terminal strip. Can be used in reports / forms.

Designation: Terminal strips: Page name of terminal-connection diagram
Description: Name of the first page of the terminal-connection diagram for the reported terminal strip. Can be used in reports / forms.

Designation: Terminal strips: Page name of terminal line-up diagram
Description: Name of the first page of the terminal line-up diagram for the reported terminal strip. Can be used in reports / forms.
